---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for AquaGuard
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature solves.
e.g. *"As a farmer, I can't export my batch scan results to CSV..."*

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered
List any alternative approaches you've considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context
Add mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain your idea.
